channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: EU leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz amid war on Iran
item.description: Pushback comes as US President Donald Trump says NATO allies should help secure key waterway amid soaring oil prices.

item.title: US says it has destroyed Iran missile capacity: How is Iran still shooting?
item.description: Despite degraded launch capabilities, Iran has enough missiles to fire strategically, keep region on edge, say experts.

item.title: Qatar calls on Iran to stop Gulf attacks, urges diplomatic solution
item.description: Qatar foreign ministry spokesman Majed al-Ansari accuses Iran of targeting civilian areas as he calls for de-escalation.

item.title: The US-Israeli strategy against Iran is working. Here is why
item.description: Every aspect of Iran’s ability to project regional power is being successfully degraded.

item.title: Qatar insists Iran is targeting civilian areas
item.description: Qatar’s Foreign Ministry spokesperson Majed Al Ansari says Iranian attacks have targeted residential areas.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz: Which countries’ ships has Iran allowed safe passage to?
item.description: Tehran allows a small number of ships from certain countries to pass through waterway.

item.title: South Korean protesters criticise Trump over Hormuz security demand
item.description: Activists in South Korea have staged a protest against Donald Trump’s request for help securing the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran still playing in World Cup 2026 despite withdrawal rumours, AFC says
item.description: Asian Football Confederation says it hasn't received any notification of Iran pulling out of upcoming World Cup.

item.title: No, MAGA is not divided on the Iran war
item.description: Trump’s supporters remain loyal, even if there are a few loud dissenting voices.

item.title: War on Iran: Can fuel rationing, remote work, short sleeves ease oil woes?
item.description: Rising oil prices amid the US-Israel war on Iran are pushing nations to readjust their energy policies.
